description:
This quiz tests intermediate to advanced Regular Expression skills, covering basic patterns, quantifiers, groups, and look-around assertions. It uses a challenging yet encouraging tone to motivate learners through progressively complex problems.
Topics: Basic regex patterns, Quantifiers, Groups, Look-around assertions, String matching, Pattern validation
Audience: Developers and programmers seeking to strengthen their regex proficiency, particularly those encountering complex pattern-matching scenarios in real-world applications.
